race.comment: ROCK THE SUNRISE (4) finished 3.5 lengths from the winner in fourth last start after being prominent at the bend over 1400m at this track, an improvement on his sixth at Doomben the run before. Well placed in this contest and looks the one they all have to run down. LONE FORCE (3) led to the turn over 1400m at Beaudesert last time out but faded to finish seventh. Should park just off the speed and his best form puts him right in this. BLACKTHORN (11) returns from a spell of five months and did score on debut when last in work at Muswellbrook over 1450m. Lines up for the first time for the Fred Wieland stable. Placed in a recent trial and can run a race while fresh. FOOLS PLAY (14) goes well for hoop Morrison who has two wins and a placing from just three steers. In the mix.
